tools.name: projects_search
tools.description: Search Epinu real-asset projects. Returns bounded summaries only; call projects_get_deep_dive for detailed packets. Results include public projects plus the token owner's own archived, draft, or unpublished projects for duplicate checks; another owner's unpublished projects are never returned. Avail

tools.name: getting_started
tools.description: Start here: platform overview, the proposal/approval operating model, auth rules, common flows, and agent etiquette. Static content — requires no scopes.

tools.name: marketplace_listings_search
tools.description: Search the Epinu marketplace for equipment, services, and assets. Returns summaries only; call marketplace_listing_get for detailed packets.
